mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dormitory_manager (dormitory_id, employee_id, residence_history_id, assigned_at, version) VALUES (#{dormitoryId}, #{employeeId}, #{residenceHistoryId}, #{assignedAt}, COALESCE(#{version}, 0)) ON CONFLICT (dormitory_id) DO UPDATE SET employee_id = EXCLUDED.employee_id, residence_history_id = EXCLUDED.residence_history_id, assigned_at = EXCLUDED.assigned_at, version = dormitory_manager.version + 1
